rows.label: tev035201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev035201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Inisae about humans.

rows.label: tev035201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev035201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Inisae if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev035201_MSG0001
rows.name:
I was wondering how your
species feels about us Ma-non?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG0002
rows.name:
I hear that some Ma-non have had
unpleasant encounters with humans in
the commercial district, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Personally, I just want to be friends with as
many humans as I can, right? But I'm a little
bit scared of your kind, to be honest...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG0004
rows.name:
I know, I'm probably being silly,
aren't I? I mean, I'll never get
along with you if I don't don't try.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG0005
rows.name:
After all, you are proof that humans can be friendly,
aren't you? So maybe if I talk to the problem humans,
we might come to a mutual understanding?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Well, my job is to go out there and gather
materials for the others, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG0009
rows.name:
But it's very very difficult
to do this job without being
discovered by indigens, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG0010
rows.name:
I know I could ask BLADE to do the
gathering, but I feel it's important
to to explore Mira for myself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I suppose I may end up getting
badly hurt one day, but those are
just the risks, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Inisae about humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Inisae if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Inisae about the Growth's weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL1041
rows.name:
Ask Inisae what she did
during the attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL1051
rows.name: Ask Inisae about the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL1061
rows.name: Ask Inisae about Sarona.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL1071
rows.name: Ask Inisae about the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL1081
rows.name: Ask Inisae what she plans to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1001
rows.name:
Sarona told me the the
most wonderful thing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1002
rows.name:
Apparently Mr. Chausson and Mr. Nagi believe
in a diplomacy-first approach when dealing
with xenoforms. Did you know this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1003
rows.name:
So whenever possible, they want
to establish friendship treaties
with new civilizations, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1004
rows.name:
How different your leadership is from those bullies
in the Growth who tried to use violence to to
assimilate us into the the the Samaar Federation![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1005
rows.name:
Who knew that humans were so wonderful? I can't
wait to make friends from all sorts of planets,
you know? It's so so so very exciting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1010
rows.name:
Do you know a Ma-non named
Sostenasa from the hangar?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1011
rows.name:
He has a gift for mechanical repairs even by
Ma-non standards—but from the sound of it, I
guess he hasn't taken kindly to humans?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1012
rows.name:
I wish I could convince him
otherwise, you know? I mean,
just look at Sarona and me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1013
rows.name:
She used to be scared of the Ma-non,
but once we got to know each other,
everything was fine, wasn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1014
rows.name:
If you find the time, maybe try talking
to Sostenasa? Perhaps he will tell you
why he has such a low opinion of humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1020
rows.name:
I agree with Sarona, you know? The
Growth's weapons seem to violate every
aesthetic standard you humans possess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1021
rows.name:
Perhaps they chose those
designs on purpose?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1022
rows.name:
It could be they were hoping their grotesque,
offensive weapons would strike fear in your hearts
and rob you of your will to fight, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1023
rows.name:
The more I think about them, the more I realize
how sickening and and and despicable an
organization the Growth truly are, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1030
rows.name: ...Me? Er, I took refuge on our ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1031
rows.name:
But I had a feeling I would walk the
streets of NLA again, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1032
rows.name:
...Why? Because you were out
there fighting for us, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1033
rows.name: And and sure enough, here I am![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1034
rows.name:
As long as we have you, NLA and the
Ma-non will always be safe, won't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1040
rows.name:
Oh, you mean the xenoforms who
stole that important Doll from
the restricted hangar, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1041
rows.name:
Did you hear about it? They
engaged the BLADEs who were
guarding the place, I guess...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1042
rows.name:
Strangely, though, the BLADEs
escaped without any serious
injury. Which is weird, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1043
rows.name:
What do you make of that?
Could it be that the Larsians
don't wish humans any harm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1044
rows.name:
Sarona might be right about them. She
thinks you could befriend the Larsians
just as you did the Ma-non, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1050
rows.name: What am I going to do with Sarona?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1051
rows.name:
The Larsians speak the same language,
but she's treating them like... Well,
like what they look like, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1052
rows.name:
Say, I have an idea. You humans
evolved from gluttonutan-like
creatures, did you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1053
rows.name:
Next time Sarona treats the
Larsians like pets, perhaps
I'll offer her a bananaleaf?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1054
rows.name:
That should get the message across
loud and clear! Er, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1060
rows.name:
I hear BLADE will be heading for
the Central Life soon, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1061
rows.name:
Be careful out there, okay? It would
be a shame if anyone died before
they got their real bodies back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1062
rows.name:
But as long as you're there fighting with
them, [ST:playername ], I know the mission will be a a
huge success. You can do it, right?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1068
rows.name:
Actually, I've decided to
explore Mira with Sarona.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1069
rows.name:
You know a lot about
indigen salvage, right, [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1070
rows.name:
You'll have to tell me which
materials make for the most
delicious recipes, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG1071
rows.name:
I want to try making rare
indigen foods now that I've
had Vasalt chocolate, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Inisae about recent developments.

rows.label: tev035201_MSG2001
rows.name:
I guess that Sostenasa the repair
worker has finally started to
warm a little toward humans?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG2002
rows.name: I assume you had had a hand in that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG2003
rows.name:
I know what it's like to be eyed with fear
and suspicion at first, so I'm really glad
that Sostenasa finally came around, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG2004
rows.name:
Thank you, [ST:playername ]. You did a
really wonderful thing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask Inisae about recent developments.

rows.label: tev035201_MSG3001
rows.name:
It sounds like Sostenasa still hasn't
revised his negative opinion of humans?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG3002
rows.name:
But he did say he would continue to
accept requests from you, yes, [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG3003
rows.name:
That's a good sign, right? Or
at least it means he's still
willing to be convinced?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG3004
rows.name:
Sarona got used to me, so let's just hope
Sostenasa can learn to do the same.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035201_MSG3005
rows.name:
If he can learn to tolerate humans,
then maybe becoming friends with
you is just a matter of time?[ST:wait ]
